CREATE TABLE test_files (file_path String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY file_path;
SELECT * FROM file('/var/log/*.log') AS f WHERE f.file_path LIKE '/var/log/%';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM file('/tmp/*.json') AS f WHERE f.file_path NOT LIKE '/tmp/data.json';
CREATE TABLE test_logs AS SELECT * FROM file('/var/log/*.log');
SELECT f.file_path, 'Log File' AS type FROM file('/var/log/*.log') AS f UNION ALL SELECT f.file_path, 'Other File' AS type FROM test_files AS f WHERE f.file_path NOT LIKE '/var/log/%';
SELECT DISTINCT file_path FROM file('/some/directory/*.txt') WHERE file_path LIKE '/some/directory/%' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_files WHERE test_files.file_path = file_path);
CREATE TABLE glob_test AS SELECT f.file_path FROM file('/var/log/*.log') AS f INNER JOIN test_files ON f.file_path = test_files.file_path;
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM file('/tmp/*.json')) AS json_count SELECT json_count, COUNT(*) FROM file('/var/log/*.log') AS f;
SELECT f.file_path FROM file('/usr/share/docs/*.*') AS f CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT file_path FROM test_files) AS tf WHERE f.file_path LIKE '/usr/share/docs/%' AND tf.file_path IS NOT NULL;
